hero.title: Your Complete Guide to Buying Custom Curtains
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know to order perfectly fitted, beautifully crafted curtains for your home. From fabric selection to installation — we've got you covered.

steps.title: Choose Your Fabric
steps.description: Browse our collection of premium fabrics. Order free swatches to see colors and textures in your home.

steps.title: Measure Your Windows
steps.description: Follow our simple measuring guides for perfect-fitting curtains every time. Takes just 10 minutes.

steps.title: Customize & Order
steps.description: Select your style, enter dimensions, and choose your perfect options. We handle the rest.

steps.title: We Craft & Deliver
steps.description: Your custom curtains are handcrafted and delivered to your door in 14 days. Free shipping over $200.

layeringCombinations.title: Day & Night Combo
layeringCombinations.subtitle: Sheer + Blackout
layeringCombinations.description: Perfect for bedrooms - sheer curtains for daytime privacy with natural light, blackout shades for complete darkness at night.

layeringCombinations.title: Elegant Layering
layeringCombinations.subtitle: Drapes + Roman Shades
layeringCombinations.description: Sophisticated combination for formal spaces. Roman shades provide clean lines while drapes add softness and luxury.

layeringCombinations.title: Modern Minimalist
layeringCombinations.subtitle: Curtains + Solar Shades
layeringCombinations.description: Clean, contemporary look with solar shades to block UV rays and reduce heat while maintaining your view.

fabricGuide.name: Linen
fabricGuide.description: Natural, breathable, and timeless. Perfect for casual elegance.

fabricGuide.name: Cotton
fabricGuide.description: Soft, versatile, and easy to care for. A practical choice for busy homes.

fabricGuide.name: Velvet
fabricGuide.description: Luxurious, rich, and insulating. Adds drama and sophistication.

fabricGuide.name: Silk
fabricGuide.description: Elegant sheen and beautiful drape. The ultimate luxury choice.

roomGuides.title: Living Room
roomGuides.description: Create a welcoming space with light-filtering fabrics that offer privacy while letting natural light in.

roomGuides.title: Bedroom
roomGuides.description: Ensure restful sleep with blackout curtains that block 99% of light and reduce outside noise.

roomGuides.title: Dining Room
roomGuides.description: Elevate your dining experience with elegant drapery that complements your decor style.

roomGuides.title: Home Office
roomGuides.description: Reduce glare on screens while maintaining a professional, polished appearance.

measureTeaser.title: Measuring Made Simple
measureTeaser.subtitle: Accurate measurements are the key to perfectly fitted curtains. Our detailed guides walk you through the process step by step.
points: Expert support if you need help

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.title: Perfect first-time experience
reviews.content: I was nervous about ordering custom curtains online, but the buying guide made it so easy. The swatches helped me pick the perfect color, and the measuring guide was spot on!

reviews.name: James K.
reviews.title: Exceeded expectations
reviews.content: The room-specific recommendations were incredibly helpful. I used the bedroom guide and my blackout curtains are perfect. Sleep has never been better!

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.title: Great value for custom
reviews.content: The step-by-step process made ordering custom curtains less intimidating. The quality is amazing and the price is better than local options. Highly recommend!

faqs.question: How do I know which fabric to choose?
faqs.answer: Order our free fabric swatches! You can select up to 10 samples to see colors and textures in your actual lighting. Each fabric page also shows care instructions and best-use recommendations.

faqs.question: What if I measure wrong?
faqs.answer: Don't worry! Our measuring guides include detailed instructions and common mistakes to avoid. If you're unsure, our customer service team can review your measurements before production.

faqs.question: How long does it take to receive my order?
faqs.answer: Each order is custom-made and typically ships within 7-10 business days. Delivery takes an additional 3-5 business days. You'll receive tracking information as soon as your order ships.

faqs.question: Can I return my custom curtains?
faqs.answer: Since each piece is custom-made to your specifications, we cannot accept returns. However, we offer free fabric swatches so you can be confident in your choice before ordering.

faqs.question: Do you offer installation services?
faqs.answer: We provide detailed DIY installation guides with every order. Installation is straightforward with basic tools. For complex projects, we can recommend local installers in select areas.
